{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Remnant owl
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|A [[Remnant]] shaped like an owl, made of swirling silver smoke with purple light, has been following [[Lindon]]'s group.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c2">''Underlord'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
